extract: Alakazam (Japanese: フーディン Foodin) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Kadabra when traded or when exposed to a Linking Cord. It is the final form of Abra. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.) Alakazam can Mega Evolve into Mega Alakazam using the Alakazite.
